title: Field-Guide Outcomes, Command Language, and REPL Contract · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Session Lifecycle
summary: A ranger team asks for a Pokedex but has not defined who uses it, which decisions it supports, what commands exist, how sessions end, or what evidence makes the command useful. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go session lifecycle increment in bounded field-guide product and REPL charter. Learners progress through prediction, ex…
objectives: Model start, prompt, read, parse, dispatch, result, continue, EOF, quit, cancellation, and cleanup as explicit session states.
Specify command names, argument grammar, whitespace policy, help text, aliases, unknown-command behavior, and stable output contracts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
